---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Jobim
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Pipeline Phase

Which phase of the Jobim pipeline does this relate to?

- [ ] Discovery
- [ ] Prototype
- [ ] Production
- [ ] Ship
- [ ] Launch

## Agent Involved

Which agent(s) does this feature involve?

- [ ] Scout
- [ ] Builder
- [ ] Designer
- [ ] UXer
- [ ] Tester
- [ ] Shipper
- [ ] Launcher
- [ ] New agent (describe below)

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like the feature to work.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered?

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, diagrams, or references that help illustrate the feature.
